response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via workshops, open-source projects, and team mentoring
Broad technical stack spanning mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and infrastructure (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentoring
Limited demonstrable experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as a systems-level enabler
No mention of strategic roadmap ownership or organizational change initiatives beyond tooling
